response.original_title: エドワード・マイブリッジ氏 によって撮影された 連続写真の 非連続的公開
response.overview: Non-continuous publication of a series of photographs taken by Edward Muybridge. Yoichi Nagata experimental film. When the decomposed photographs of movement taken by Muybridge are sequentially made into film frames, the movement is reproduced. Then, what happens when the decomposed photographs are combined in pieces and played back?
response.title: エドワード・マイブリッジ氏 によって撮影された 連続写真の 非連続的公開
